/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/spacetime_sim.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spacetime_sim.dir/surface_utils.mm.o -o spacetime_sim  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libglfw.3.4.dylib /Users/leog/CLionProjects/physics/dawn/install/Release/lib/libwebgpu_dawn.a -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework Foundation -framework IOSurface -framework QuartzCore -framework Metal
